summary: Made final product decision [DEC-003]: Crewspace — TypeScript-native agent orchestration framework with visual canvas, OSS-first (MIT) → commercial freemium SaaS. Unanimous 3-agent consensus after 9 proposals, 3 challenge rounds, 3 YES verdicts. Updated company-config.json (domain, product_type, target_audience, monetization, product_vision). Advanced project-status.md from ideation to planning phase. Logged full rationale in decisions.md.
